comments.name: Briva
comments.text: I'm not a coffee drinker, but this seems like it was a really fun event! I love getting to learn by passionate proxy. I also relate a lot to the midlife crisis stuff. I've had an abundance of free time for the past few months, and while I have been dipping into a variety of interests, none of it has quite felt fulfilling. I'm trying to figure out what I really want to do with my life. While it feels a little bad to not have a solid direction, it's important to remember that we still have plenty of life left in us and we never have to go it alone. We'll reach those dreams together.
